title: Analysis scripts for the population genomics of Saccharomyces eubayanus (2026)
description: Reproducible analysis scripts accompanying the Saccharomyces eubayanus population-genomics study: GATK variant calling, phylogenomics and population structure, PopGenome statistics, Nanopore assembly and structural-variant analysis (including TE-SV association), maltose (MAL) phenotyping, admixture and local-ancestry inference (Dsuite D-statistics/f-branch, LOTER, NeighborNet networks, chromosome painting), competitive two-species read mapping, and IQ-TREE 3 + LSD2 divergence-time estimation.
